title: Consumer forum dismisses complaint against Mercedes-Benz over non-deployment of airbags in under-ride collision
description: The Tamil Nadu State Consumer Disputes Redressal Commission dismissed a complaint against Mercedes-Benz India and one of its dealer alleging a manufacturing defect after airbags in a luxury car failed to deploy during a road accident. [MGG Trading Pvt Ltd v. Mercedes-Benz India Pvt Ltd & Anr.]The Commission held that the complainant had failed to establish any defect in the vehicle. It accepted the manufacturer’s explanation that the accident was an under-ride collision in which the car slid
